mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS productId, NVL(deal_stat.sale_price, p.price) AS price, p.status FROM products p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po.product_id, MIN(hp.hot_deal_price) AS sale_price FROM hot_deals h JOIN hot_deal_products hp ON hp.hot_deal_id = h.id JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hp.product_option_id WHERE h.status = 'ACTIVE' AND h.deleted_at IS NULL AND SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN h.starts_at AND h.ends_at GROUP BY po.product_id ) deal_stat ON deal_stat.product_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{productId}

SELECT pc.id AS purchaseId, pc.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.status AS productStatus, pc.quantity, pc.purchase_price AS purchasePrice, pc.created_at AS purchasedAt, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation FROM purchases pc JOIN products p ON p.id = pc.product_id LEFT JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.id = ( SELECT MIN(pp2.id) FROM product_pictures pp2 WHERE pp2.product_id = p.id ) WHERE pc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY pc.created_at DESC, pc.id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT id AS productOptionId, stock FROM product_options WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND stock > 0 ORDER BY expire_date ASC, id ASC FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchases ( user_id, product_id, quantity, purchase_price, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{purchasePrice}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO purchase_product_options ( purchase_id, product_option_id, quantity, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{purchaseId}, #{productOptionId}, #{quantity}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
